MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SAFECO's INSURANCE DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The Hurley declaration shows parties did not meet and confer in person, by telephone, or by video conference, as required by CCP 430.41. Parties are ordered to comply with the code.
